lead, q. D.-The American Mining
congress. which opened It's sixth an
hual session at the adjoining city
OF Deadwood. moved over into Lead
yesterday and resumes business here
today. This afternoon the visitors
will inspect the mines and mining

Epeartish canyon. Three sessions will
